overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage showing a wizard character exploring a dimly lit potions classroom in a gothic castle. The character walks through the stone-arched room filled with wooden workbenches and alchemical equipment, examines a large chalkboard with diagrams, and exits through a heavy wooden door into a corridor.

events.description: character enters the potions classroom through a stone archway
character slows to observe the workbenches while walking

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the classroom, observing the potion workbenches and laboratory equipment arranged throughout the stone hall

entered.detail: gothic stone archway with wooden door frame marking the classroom entry
large copper cauldron suspended from the vaulted ceiling
long wooden tables with potion equipment and glowing heaters underneath
thick stone columns supporting the arched ceiling
medieval-style iron lanterns suspended from chains

segments.scene_description: The character enters a large gothic potions classroom through a stone archway. The room features high vaulted ceilings, stone pillars, and multiple wooden workbenches equipped with cauldrons and alchemical apparatus. Warm lantern light illuminates the stone interior as the character walks forward exploring the space.

scene_state.functional_zone: front of classroom with instructor's workbench and chalkboard

events.description: character stops at the front workbench to examine the alchemical equipment
character turns to face the large chalkboard and studies the diagrams

agents.ego_description: standing at the front of the classroom examining the alchemy equipment and studying the diagrams on the large chalkboard

entered.detail: large wooden table with brass distillation apparatus and burning flame underneath
tall wooden-framed blackboard covered in potion diagrams and instructions
gothic arched windows with blue tinted glass allowing natural light
tall shelves filled with books and potion ingredients

segments.scene_description: The character reaches the front of the classroom where an elaborate alchemy workbench sits with brass equipment and an open spellbook. A large chalkboard covered in potion diagrams dominates the wall, flanked by bookshelves. Arched windows provide blue-tinted natural light as the character stops to examine the equipment and study the chalkboard before turning to leave.

scene_state.functional_zone: return path through classroom toward exit

events.description: character turns away from chalkboard and begins walking back through the classroom
character approaches the exit archway at the far end of the classroom

agents.ego_description: walking back through the classroom toward the exit, passing rows of potion workbenches

entered.detail: gothic stone archway leading to a side antechamber
tall wooden storage cabinet with glass doors containing ingredients

segments.scene_description: The character turns and walks back through the classroom, passing the rows of workbenches from the opposite direction. The camera moves toward a stone archway exit at the far end of the hall, passing additional potion stations and a wooden storage cabinet.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow antechamber with portraits leading to exit corridor

events.description: character passes through stone archway into darker antechamber with portrait frames
character opens large wooden door and steps through into corridor

agents.ego_description: walking through a narrow antechamber lined with portraits, then opening a heavy wooden door to exit into a corridor

entered.detail: framed portraits of historical figures hanging on the stone wall
heavy carved wooden doors with metal handles marking the exit
lit wall-mounted torch sconces providing dim illumination

segments.scene_description: The character enters a darker antechamber with portrait frames on the walls, then approaches and opens a large wooden double door. The scene transitions as the character steps through the doorway into a lit stone corridor, completing the exit from the potions classroom.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a gothic potions classroom that eventually leads out into a lit stone corridor. It begins as the character enters through a stone archway into a vaulted room filled with wooden workbenches and warm lantern light. As the character advances, the scene shifts toward the front of the classroom, where the warm glow meets blue-tinted natural light from arched windows illuminating a large chalkboard and brass alchemical equipment. The camera then pivots and retreats through the rows of potion stations, passing a wooden storage cabinet before entering a darker antechamber lined with portrait frames. Finally, the character opens a set of large wooden double doors, stepping through the threshold to emerge into a bright stone corridor.
